rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ARNOLD S GRIDLEY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petitioners Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment Or In The Alternative For Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Motion is denied. There are triable issues of material fact so that none of the issues may be determined as a matter of law.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF HENRIETTE M ROTHENBERG
rulings.Calendar Matter: Respondent'S Demurrer To Petition Re Will Contest
rulings.Rulings: Counsel for demurring party must file proof of personal service signed by the person who served counsel for contestant. If proper proof of service is filed, the demurrer will be sustained without leave to amend.
